sections.heading: Course overview
sections.markdown:
**Marketplace Harness Smoke Test** is a minimal official free course used to verify the MC0 authoring and provisioning pipeline.

- **Estimated time:** about 15 minutes
- **Format:** One short module with a page, a reflection assignment, and a knowledge check
- **Price:** Free — claim it from the marketplace

This course is not a subject curriculum; it exists so deploys and CI can prove idempotent provisioning end-to-end.

sections.heading: What you'll learn
sections.markdown:
By the end of this course, you will be able to:

1. **Explain** what an official marketplace course is
2. **Complete** a short auto-scored knowledge check

sections.heading: Grading & completion
sections.markdown:
- The knowledge-check quiz is auto-scored
- The reflection assignment awards full credit on a good-faith text submission

There are no due dates. Work at your own pace.
